title: Multislab
description: Enables mixing of multiple slab blocks into one full block
body:
# Multislab

Multislab is mod which allows you to finally mix and match slab blocks to your hearts delight! You no longer need to carefully align structures to fake mixed slab arrangements by having them across a block boundary.

## Dependencies
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Quilted Fabric API / QSL](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)
## Installation
Make sure you have Quiltloader installed and then drop this mod and its dependencies into your mods folder. This mod introduces no new worldgen, so it can be added to existing packs and worlds without issue.
